summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Tycoon page and all Anima Fund features. Backend APIs working 100%, new Tycoon functionality fully operational with animated building, agents, and stats. All navigation and existing pages work correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Multiple React Flow edge creation errors: 'Couldn't create edge for source handle id: undefined' - same as previous iteration

passed_tests: All 14 backend API endpoints working perfectly (100% success rate)
New Tycoon page loads and displays 7 department floors correctly
Tycoon top stats bar shows AUM ($47.5M), USDC balance ($892K), fund level (47), daily income ($4K/day), agent count (25/33)
Tycoon sidebar shows Fund Stats (3% mgmt fee, 20% carry, 50% human share, 99% rejection rate, etc.)
Tycoon sidebar shows department progress bars with current agent counts
Navigation 'Fund HQ' tab successfully navigates to tycoon page
All existing pages still work: Overview, Agent Network, Deal Flow, Portfolio, Financials, Activity, Configuration
Backend API /api/fund/overview returns correct data with fund_name='Anima Fund'
Backend API /api/agents returns 33 agents as required
Backend API /api/departments returns department data with current counts
Backend API /api/constitution returns updated Anima Fund constitution (source: anima_fund)
Automaton engine files verified: genesis-prompt.md exists
Automaton deployment script verified: deploy.sh exists
All 5 VC skills exist in /app/automaton/skills/: deal-evaluation, cost-validation, incubation-management, hiring-validation, capital-duplication
Animated agent sprites working on Tycoon floors with movement and speech bubbles
Live Feed showing dynamic notifications on Tycoon page
Building visual with proper floor layout and department labels
success_percentage: Backend: 100%, Frontend: 95% (same React Flow issue persists)
action_item_for_main_agent: React Flow edge creation errors still present in Agent Network page - edges not connecting properly due to undefined source handle ids. This is the same issue from iteration 1 and doesn't affect the new Tycoon functionality.
